summary: Added guarded Oracle test-data DML tooling as a separate oracle_testdata MCP and added BPMN-vs-MoM testcase generation rules that require Playwright MCP evidence before confirming UI test steps.
derived_updates: Kept oracle_readonly strictly read-only while introducing oracle_testdata for explicit saved-plan DML only.
Added dry-run-by-default DB injection plans under 06-testing/test-data/db-injection/plans and execution evidence under 05-observability/db-injection/execution-results.
Persistent DB test-data commit now requires --apply --commit, a plan confirmation token, and TESTDATA_DML_COMMIT.
Added BPMN/MoM testcase comparator skill and prompt requiring raw catalog selection, MoM+BPMN reconciliation, Playwright MCP UI evidence, and Oracle read-only persistence checks when needed.
